description: Adversarial Set Cover instances for E5 robustness testing
design: Construct instances where the unique optimal integer solution uses sets S with LP values x*_S < τ. The LP threshold certificate (τ-based) would incorrectly prune these essential sets, making I_Φ infeasible. CASP's safety net (Algorithm 1 step 7 feasibility re-check) must detect infeasibility and trigger fallback to A(I).
generation_strategy: 1. Start with a small core of expensive sets that form the unique optimal cover. 2. Add many cheap LP-favored sets that dominate the LP solution. 3. Set τ such that the core sets are pruned (x*_S < τ). 4. Verify: pruned instance is infeasible → safety net triggers.
status: scaffold — concrete generator to be implemented per-parameter-grid
